textByHashes.1519ad4460d28ff3c4c8d51a43337fa52d24eada: Greetings! I am Sir Lancelot, the greatest Knight in the land! What do you want?
textByHashes.169354faa65c0baa82fc41305742e05e85e0bcd8: The Grail? Ha! Frankly, friend, you're not in that league.
textByHashes.c63dcf94a281467af9c46d89272984b93ae4ac37: You got lucky with freeing Merlin but there's no way a puny wannabe like you is going to find the Holy Grail where so many others have failed.
textByHashes.df2af36ac827d1abf9fe2bc9b7986ce2edb993d1: Hmmm. I heard you freed Merlin. Either you're better than you look or you got lucky. I think the latter.
textByHashes.5cf1a127879926c6163bb798c31d888c2ad6942f: I could have taken all of them on! Those Black Knights wouldn't stand a chance against me, the greatest knight in the land.
textByHashes.23efa0f3549f0b71a0725c5f0035d877c08d49a4: They attacked while I was in the bath. What was I to do?
textByHashes.6a5cc1415e0e3f08f7e44eb4f652806c085d05fa: Hey, are you laughing at me, the greatest knight in the land?
textByHashes.594f4525c4d50f6b7b00110b040c548b1917d709: No, but when we do, I'm going to make those Black Knights black and blue all over.
textByHashes.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHashes.f2b2d165a392ab91383ef97ced109d7a712580e2: How dare you attempt to imprison the greatest knight in the land? Have at thee!
textByHashes.03429e8e467368395b9dcf47b25df615beab14dd: I'll make them pay for what they've done to King Arhtur.
textByHashes.fb7a3bdeab1fd7c0f8edfedd1c9081176ca52c1e: Well, if the Knights of the Round Table can't manage it, I can't see how a commoner like you could succeed where we have failed.
textByHashes.352c329ac439ebc4cbdb27899e044618e29c5528: That stronghold is built in a strong defensive position.
textByHashes.864d340b5475374caaabcf2c0d30bb0ae0895548: It's on a big rock sticking out into the sea.
textByHashes.12a3cef2d8e9671fdefabacd9fc17b3c2fc6f8da: There are two ways in that I know of, the large heavy front doors, and the sea entrance, only penetrable by boat. They get all their deliveries by boat from Catherby.
textByHashes.d65af5d83d7cddec30240983d04c470d536742a2: I have every right to be proud of myself.
textByHashes.edaf923327093a897c4d031c86032d15b95e952f: My prowess in battle is world renowned!
textByHashes.8e2b7b5c81d60aa8c105287138a6ed82fdb1a4bc: Sir Knight! Many thanks for your assistance in restoring Merlin to his former freedom!
textByHashes.265f7d9d5adc798b0a4ea8027729acda6e773bb6: Humph. You are indeed a better knight than I first suspected.
